|                                                                                                  |
| help:                                                                                            |
| command route: help                                                                              |
| route source: policy.command                                                                     |
| Deterministic placeholder help.                                                                  |
| commands:                                                                                        |
| /status - Show deterministic placeholder status.                                                 |
| /help - Show this deterministic placeholder help.                                                |
| /quit - Quit Aila.                                                                               |
| shortcuts:                                                                                       |
| ctrl+x s - Show deterministic placeholder status.                                                |
| ctrl+x q - Quit Aila.                                                                            |
